---
title: "Skrub Tutorial Slides"
format: html
---

## Section 1: Introduction
- [Chapter 0: Introduction](chapters/00_intro.slides.html)

## Section 2: Exploring and sanitizing data
- [Chapter 1: Exploring Data](chapters/01_exploring_data.slides.html)
- [Chapter 2: Cleaning Data](chapters/02_cleaning_data.slides.html)
- [Quiz 01](../book/chapters/quiz_01.html)
- Exercise 1

## Section 3: Building a strong baseline
- [Chapter 3: Table Vectorization](chapters/03_table_vectorizer.slides.html)
- [Chapter 4: Tabular Pipelines](chapters/04_tabular_pipeline.slides.html)
- [Quiz 02](../book/chapters/quiz_02.html)
- Exercise 2

## Section 4: Transforming columns
- [Chapter 5: Apply Transformations](chapters/05_feat_eng_apply.slides.html)
- [Chapter 6: Selectors](chapters/06_selectors.slides.html)
- [Quiz 03](../book/chapters/quiz_03.html)
- Exercise 3


## Section 5: Feature Engineering with skrub
- [Chapter 7: Skrub transformers for feature engineering](chapters/07_feature_eng_all.slides.html)
- [Quiz 04](../book/chapters/quiz_04.html)

## Section 6: Building dynamic pipeline with Data Ops
- [Chapter 8: Data Ops](chapters/10_data_ops.slides.html)
